title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD's Methodology - Initial Results
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Defense Stocks Rise After DOD Doles Out High-Value Awards

title: In Times of Conflict, Defense Wins Championships

title: Bert's November Dividend Income Summary
text: We save a high percentage of our income each month, to help fuel our dividend stock portfolio. We received $855.31 in November dividend income. This was an 11.93% increase compared to November 2021.

title: Like Dividends? 3 Aristocrats Worthy of Consideration
text: Dividend Aristocrats are top-tier investments for those focusing on income, as these companies have successfully upped their dividend payouts for a minimum of 25 consecutive years.

title: The 7 Hottest Defense Stocks to Own for 2023 and Beyond

title: This Defense Company Appears To Be A Better Pick Over Textron Stock
